seed_instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals.
org_constraint: The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs.
new_constraint: The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.
instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must consist of exactly three paragraphs. The email should consist of 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least four sentences.
response:
Subject: Introduction and Academic Goals – [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Last Name], I am writing to formally introduce myself as a prospective student interested in your upcoming course. My name is [Your Name] and I am currently pursuing my undergraduate degree in [Your Major] at [Your University]. I have long admired your research on [Specific Topic] and believe it aligns perfectly with my academic interests. It would be a great honor to have the opportunity to learn from your expertise and guidance.

My primary goal for this semester is to develop a deeper understanding of the theoretical frameworks you teach in your class. I am particularly eager to engage in critical discussions that challenge my existing assumptions about [Specific Concept]. Additionally, I hope to apply the practical skills you emphasize in your lectures to real-world scenarios I encounter in my daily life. I am committed to putting in the necessary effort to master the material and contribute meaningfully to our class discussions.

Beyond the classroom, I aim to leverage the connections you make with industry leaders to explore potential career paths in [Target Field]. I am also planning to volunteer at a local organization that focuses on [Related Cause] to gain practical experience while studying. I would greatly appreciate any advice you might have regarding balancing rigorous coursework with extracurricular commitments. Thank you for considering my introduction and for the time you have taken to read this message.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
